title: Pep: 'Part of myself' leaving with Silva from City
summary: Pep Guardiola expressed his emotional connection to departing player Bernardo Silva, saying "part of myself is leaving" Manchester City. The manager emphasized the significance of Silva's contributions and wants the Portugal playmaker to receive a proper farewell. This reflects the profound impact Silva has had on the club's success over his tenure.
content: Pep Guardiola has said "part of myself is leaving" with Bernardo Silva -- as the Manchester City manager urged his side to give the outgoing Portugal playmaker the perfect send-off.

zh.title: 瓜迪奥拉："自己的一部分"随席尔瓦离开曼城
zh.summary: 瓜迪奥拉表达了他与离队球员伯纳多·席尔瓦的情感联系，说"自己的一部分正在离开"曼彻斯特城。这位主教练强调了席尔瓦贡献的重要性，希望这位葡萄牙边锋能得到恰当的送别。这反映了席尔瓦在其任职期间对俱乐部成功的深远影响。

title: Linlithgow Rose miss out on pyramid play-offs over licence, set up Brora v Edinburgh final
summary: Linlithgow Rose has been deemed ineligible for the SPFL pyramid play-offs this season due to licensing issues. This administrative ruling means Brora Rangers will instead face Edinburgh City in the final. The decision removes one team from contention based on regulatory compliance rather than sporting performance.
content: Linlithgow Rose "are not eligible to participate in" this season's SPFL pyramid play-offs, meaning Brora Rangers will take on Edinburgh City in the final.

zh.title: 林利斯高玫瑰因执照问题无缘金字塔附加赛，布罗拉对阵爱丁堡决赛
zh.summary: 林利斯高玫瑰因执照问题被裁定不符合本赛季苏超金字塔附加赛资格。这项行政裁决意味着布罗拉流浪者队将与爱丁堡城队争夺决赛权。这个决定是基于监管合规性而非体育表现将一支球队排除在竞争之外。

title: Spurs condemn 'vile' racist abuse aimed at Danso
summary: Tottenham Hotspur has reported racist abuse directed at defender Kevin Danso to police authorities. The club characterized the abuse as "vile" and "dehumanizing," taking a firm stance against discrimination in football. This incident reflects ongoing concerns about racial abuse in the sport.
content: Tottenham Hotspur have reported "vile, dehumanising" abuse towards defender Kevin Danso to the police.

zh.title: 热刺谴责针对丹索的"令人厌恶的"种族歧视性辱骂
zh.summary: 热刺队已向警方报告了针对后卫凯文·丹索的种族歧视性辱骂。俱乐部将这种辱骂描述为"令人厌恶的"和"非人道的"，对足球中的歧视采取了坚定态度。这一事件反映了体育界持续存在的对种族歧视性辱骂的担忧。

title: Spurs report 'abhorrent' racist abuse of Danso
summary: Tottenham has condemned racist abuse targeting defender Kevin Danso following the team's 2-2 draw with Brighton on Saturday. The club described the abuse as "vile" and "dehumanising racism" and reported it to authorities. The incident highlights persistent problems with racial abuse in professional football.
content: Tottenham have condemned the "vile, dehumanising racism" aimed at defender Kevin Danso following Saturday's 2-2 draw with Brighton.

zh.title: 热刺举报对丹索的"可憎的"种族虐待
zh.summary: 托特纳姆热刺已谴责针对后卫凯文·丹索的种族虐待，此事发生在球队与布莱顿2:2战平之后。俱乐部将此虐待描述为"卑鄙"和"非人道的种族主义"，并向当局报告。事件突显了职业足球中种族虐待的持续问题。

title: Rosenior: Estêvão in tears after 'devastating' injury
summary: Chelsea manager Liam Rosenior revealed that young player Estêvão was emotionally devastated after sustaining an injury during the first half of Chelsea's defeat to Manchester United on Sunday. The player's tears at halftime underscored the severity of the injury. The incident occurred early in what became a disappointing loss for the club.
content: Chelsea boss Liam Rosenior has revealed that Estêvão was in tears at half-time after he was forced off with an injury early in his side's defeat to Manchester United on Sunday.

zh.title: 罗塞尼奥：埃斯特瓦奥在"毁灭性"伤病后泪流满面
zh.summary: 切尔西主教练利亚姆·罗塞尼奥透露，年轻球员埃斯特瓦奥在周日切尔西对曼联的失利中上半场受伤后情感崩溃。该球员在中场休息时的眼泪突显了伤病的严重性。这次受伤发生在俱乐部一场令人失望的失败的早期。

title: First 'daylight' offside goal scored in Canadian Premier League
summary: Alejandro Diaz of Pacific FC scored a goal against Halifax Wanderers under the experimental "daylight offside" rule, marking the first such goal in the Canadian Premier League. The rule change permits greater leniency in offside decisions to increase attacking play. This milestone demonstrates the practical application of the new regulation.
content: Pacific FC forward Alejandro Diaz scores against Halifax Wanderers in the Canadian Premier League, the first instance of a "daylight offside" situation resulting in a goal.

zh.title: 加拿大超级足球联赛首次"明显"越位进球
zh.summary: 太平洋足球俱乐部的亚历杭德罗·迪亚兹在实验性的"明显越位"规则下攻入对哈利法克斯流浪者的进球，标志着加拿大超级足球联赛的首个此类进球。规则变化允许在越位判决中给予更大的宽恕，以增加进攻比赛。这个里程碑展示了新规定的实际应用。

title: Transfer rumors, news: PSG move for Arsenal star Martinelli
summary: Paris Saint-Germain sporting director Luis Campos has met with representatives of Arsenal winger Gabriel Martinelli, signaling concrete transfer interest. PSG is actively exploring the possibility of acquiring the Brazilian winger in the coming transfer window. The meeting represents a significant step in potential negotiations between the clubs.
content: Paris Saint-Germain sporting director Luis Campos has held a meeting with the representatives of Arsenal winger Gabriel Martinelli. Transfer Talk has the latest.

zh.title: 转会传闻新闻：巴黎圣日耳曼为阿森纳明星马蒂内利出价
zh.summary: 巴黎圣日耳曼体育总监路易斯·坎波斯与阿森纳边锋加布里埃尔·马蒂内利的代表进行了会面，表明了具体的转会兴趣。PSG正在积极探索在即将到来的转会窗口期间收购这位巴西边锋的可能性。这次会议代表了两家俱乐部潜在谈判中的重要一步。

title: First 'daylight' offside goal scored in Canada
summary: The first goal allowed under the experimental "daylight" offside rule was scored in Canadian football, marking a notable milestone in testing the new regulation. The goal demonstrates the real-world application of the controversial offside rule change. The result provides concrete evidence of how the new rule operates in competitive play.
content: The first goal allowed under the experimental "daylight" ​offside rule is scored in Canada

zh.title: 加拿大首个"昭然若揭"越位进球
zh.summary: 加拿大足球首次在实验性的"昭然若揭"越位规则下允许进球，标志着测试新规则的一个重要里程碑。这粒进球展示了有争议的越位规则变化在现实中的应用。这个结果提供了新规则在竞争性比赛中如何运作的具体证据。

title: Lessons to be learned as Wales chase top spot
summary: Wales maintained momentum in their World Cup qualifying campaign with a victory in Albania, but the team recognizes significant improvements are necessary. The win keeps Wales on track for their first Women's World Cup qualification. The result shows progress while highlighting areas requiring refinement for future matches.
content: Wales kept their qualifying campaign on track with victory in Albania, but better is required if they are to reach a first Women's World Cup.

zh.title: 威尔士追逐榜首时需汲取的教训
zh.summary: 威尔士在对阿尔巴尼亚的胜利中保持了在世界杯预选赛中的势头，但球队认识到需要进行重大改进。这场胜利使威尔士保持在争取首次女足世界杯资格的正轨上。这个结果显示了进步，同时突出了未来比赛中需要改进的领域。

title: 'Frustrated' Scotland show signs of growth in Belgium
summary: Scotland drew 0-0 away against Belgium in a World Cup qualifier, with players expressing frustration despite showing signs of improvement. The goalless draw indicates developing defensive strength and competitive growth in their qualification bid. The result suggests Scotland is moving positively despite the disappointing lack of goals.
content: A goalless draw away in Belgium was greeted with frustration by Scotland players in their World Cup bid, a sign that things are improving, writes Amy Canavan.

zh.title: 苏格兰在比利时展现成长迹象，失望感犹存
zh.summary: 苏格兰在世界杯预选赛中客场与比利时战成0:0，球员们表达了失望，但也显示了进步迹象。这场无进球的平局表明苏格兰防线正在加强，预选赛中竞争力在提升。尽管没有进球令人遗憾，但这个结果表明苏格兰正朝着积极方向发展。

title: Goalscoring keeper Bycroft has 'incredible eye for goal'
summary: Exeter City goalkeeper Jack Bycroft has demonstrated an exceptional ability to score goals, standing out for his "incredible eye for goal." His rare skill set combines traditional goalkeeping duties with attacking prowess. Bycroft represents an unusual talent who brings multiple dimensions to the pitch.
content: How Exeter City's goalscoring keeper Jack Bycroft has 'an incredible eye for a goal'. .

zh.title: 进球门将拜克罗夫特拥有"惊人的进球天赋"
zh.summary: 埃克塞特城门将杰克·拜克罗夫特展现了非凡的进球能力，因其"惊人的进球天赋"而脱颖而出。他独特的技能组合了传统门将职责和进攻能力。拜克罗夫特是一位不寻常的天才，为球场带来多维贡献。

title: Rangers to demand £20m for Fernandez - gossip
summary: Rangers are reportedly planning to demand a substantial £20 million fee for centre-back Emmanuel Fernandez in the upcoming transfer window. Meanwhile, Celtic will need to make a significant offer if they want to attract a potential managerial candidate. Both clubs are strategizing their transfer approaches for the summer.
content: Rangers will demand a big fee for centre-back Emmanuel Fernandez this summer, while Celtic will need to make a sizeabe offer to lure a potential manager.

zh.title: 流浪者队要求范德斯2000万英镑费用 - 传言
zh.summary: 据报道，流浪者队计划在即将到来的转会窗口对后卫埃曼努埃尔·范德斯提出高达2000万英镑的要价。与此同时，凯尔特人队需要提出重大报价才能吸引一位潜在的主教练人选。两家俱乐部都在为夏季转会进行战略规划。

title: Game: Answer our prompts to get a Man City v Arsenal prediction
summary: The BBC Sport supercomputer offers personalized match predictions for Manchester City versus Arsenal based on user responses to eight simple questions. This interactive tool generates unique predictions for each fan while showcasing predictive analytics. The feature engages supporters while demonstrating advanced forecasting capabilities.
content: By answering our eight simple questions the BBC Sport supercomputer will be able to give you a unique prediction.

zh.title: 游戏：回答我们的提示，获得曼城对阿森纳的预测
zh.summary: BBC体育超级计算机根据用户对八个简单问题的回答，为曼城对阿森纳的比赛提供个性化预测。这个交互式工具为每位球迷生成独特的预测，同时展示预测分析。该功能吸引支持者，同时展示了先进的预测能力。

title: The Welshman who influenced Europe's coaching elite
summary: Welsh coach Osian Roberts has significantly influenced the careers of prominent coaches including Thierry Henry, Cesc Fabregas, and Mikel Arteta. He now plays a key role in Italian side Como's development and competitive rise through the football pyramid. Roberts' trajectory demonstrates the lasting impact coaching mentors have on elite football.
content: Osian Roberts shaped the coaching careers of Thierry Henry, Cesc Fabregas and Mikel Arteta and is now a key part of Italian side Como's rise.

zh.title: 影响欧洲足球教练精英的威尔士人
zh.summary: 威尔士教练奥西安·罗伯茨显著影响了蒂埃里·亨利、塞斯克·法布雷加斯和米克尔·阿尔特塔等杰出教练的职业生涯。他现在在意大利球队科莫的发展和足球金字塔中的竞争性崛起中发挥关键作用。罗伯茨的轨迹展示了教练导师对精英足球的持久影响。

title: Why Man City's 'leg-beaters' can make the difference against Arsenal
summary: Tony Pulis analyzes how Manchester City's attacking players could be decisive in Sunday's Premier League title clash against leaders Arsenal. The analysis highlights tactical elements that may determine the outcome of this crucial match.
content: Tony Pulis explains why Manchester City's attacking players could prove to be their match-winners in Sunday's Premier League title showdown with leaders Arsenal.

zh.title: 曼城的'腿击手'为何能在对阿森纳的比赛中扮演关键角色
zh.summary: 托尼·普利斯分析了曼城的进攻球员如何在周日与英超领头羊阿森纳的冠军争夺中发挥决定性作用。该分析重点突出了可能决定这场关键比赛结果的战术因素。

title: How will Arteta set Arsenal up for Man City showdown?
summary: Arsenal manager Arteta may deploy novel tactical solutions against Manchester City as the title race intensifies. Analysis of recent Arsenal form suggests strategic adjustments could prove crucial in this championship decider.
content: Novel solutions, no matter how small, might decide the Premier League title. We take a closer look at how Arsenal have played recently and what this means for the run-in.

zh.title: 阿尔特塔将如何为阿森纳对阵曼城做准备?
zh.summary: 随着冠军争夺的加剧，阿森纳主教练阿尔特塔可能会采用新颖的战术方案对抗曼城。对阿森纳近期表现的分析表明，战术调整可能对这场冠军决赛至关重要。

title: De Zerbi vows Spurs can win last 5 to survive
summary: Roberto de Zerbi expressed confidence that Tottenham can win all five remaining Premier League matches to avoid relegation while warning unhappy players away from training. This reflects both optimism and determination during a critical period for the club.
content: Roberto de Zerbi believes Tottenham can win all five remaining Premier League games to emphatically avoid relegation -- and warned any unhappy players will be turned away from the club's training ground on Monday.

zh.title: 德泽尔比誓言热刺可赢剩余5场保级
zh.summary: 罗伯托·德泽尔比表示相信热刺能赢下剩余五场英超联赛以避免降级，同时警告不满的球员远离训练。这反映了球队在关键时期的乐观态度和决心。

title: Man Utd give Chelsea 'mountain to climb' for UCL
summary: Chelsea faces an uphill battle to qualify for the Champions League after losing 1-0 to Manchester United, with manager Liam Rosenior acknowledging the difficulty ahead. The defeat marks a significant setback in their European qualification hopes.
content: Liam Rosenior said Chelsea have "a mountain to climb" to qualify for the Champions League after they lost 1-0 to Manchester United on Saturday.

zh.title: 曼联给切尔西欧冠前景增添巨大挑战
zh.summary: 切尔西在0-1负于曼联后，要想进入欧冠面临巨大困难，经理利亚姆·罗森纳承认前路艰难。这场失利给他们的欧洲杯赛资格希望带来了重大挫折。

title: Matarazzo's Copa win makes U.S. coaching history
summary: Pellegrino Matarazzo became the first U.S.-born coach to win a trophy in one of Europe's top five leagues after Real Sociedad's Copa del Rey victory. This achievement represents a milestone for American representation in European football management.
content: Real Sociedad's Copa del Rey win made Pellegrino Matarazzo the first U.S.-born coach to win a trophy in Europe's "big five" leagues.

zh.title: 马塔拉佐的国王杯胜利创造美国教练历史
zh.summary: 佩莱格里诺·马塔拉佐在皇家社会赢得国王杯后，成为首位在欧洲五大联赛之一赢得冠军的美国籍教练。这一成就代表了美国教练在欧洲足球管理中的里程碑。

title: Messi stunner gives Miami's new coach debut win
summary: Lionel Messi scored two goals, including a 79th-minute winner, to give Inter Miami victory in interim coach Guillermo Hoyos' first match in charge. The performance provided an impressive start to Hoyos' tenure with the MLS club.
content: Lionel Messi had two goals, including a stunning 79th-minute winner, to give Inter Miami a victory in new interim coach Guillermo Hoyos' first match in charge Saturday.

zh.title: 梅西精彩进球为迈阿密新帅首战带来胜利
zh.summary: 莱昂内尔·梅西打进两球，其中包括第79分钟的制胜球，帮助迈阿密国际队在临时主教练吉列尔莫·奥约斯的首场执教中赢得胜利。这场表现为奥约斯在美职联的执教生涯开启了成功的开局。

title: Gnabry injury deals Bayern blow; WCup in doubt
summary: Bayern Munich forward Serge Gnabry is sidelined for the remainder of the season, creating uncertainty around his availability for Germany's World Cup campaign. The injury represents a significant loss for both club and country.
content: Bayern Munich forward Serge Gnabry is likely to miss the rest of the season, putting his World Cup participation for Germany in doubt.

zh.title: 格纳夫里伤病打击拜仁；世界杯参赛成疑
zh.summary: 拜仁慕尼黑前锋塞尔日·格纳夫里赛季报销，其能否参加德国队世界杯之旅成为悬念。这一伤病对俱乐部和国家队都造成了重大损失。

title: Napoli booed as loss puts Inter on verge of title
summary: Napoli's 2-0 home defeat to Lazio, accompanied by crowd disapproval, positioned Inter Milan on the brink of winning the Serie A title. The loss represents a critical moment in the Italian league title race.
content: Napoli was jeered off the field after it lost 2-0 at home to Lazio -- a result that saw Inter Milan take a huge step toward winning the Serie A title.

zh.title: 那不勒斯遭球迷嘘声；国际米兰近在咫尺夺冠
zh.summary: 那不勒斯在主场0:2不敌拉齐奥，遭到球迷嘘声，国际米兰因此距离意甲冠军越来越近。这场失利标志着意大利甲级联赛争冠形势的关键时刻。

title: Spurs find silver lining vs. Brighton, but not a desperately needed win
summary: Tottenham drew 2-2 with Brighton but failed to secure a victory, extending their winless run in the Premier League through 2026. Despite positive performances, the team's lack of wins continues to threaten their fight for survival.
content: Tottenham still haven't won in the Premier League in 2026, following Saturday's 2-2 draw with Brighton. Nevertheless, there are positives to take.

zh.title: 热刺对阵布莱顿虽有亮点，但仍未迎来急需的胜利
zh.summary: 托特纳姆热刺与布莱顿战成2:2，未能获胜，英超不胜纪录进一步延长。尽管表现积极，缺乏胜利仍然威胁其保级前景。

title: Man United close in on UCL return by beating increasingly toxic Chelsea
summary: Manchester United defeated Chelsea and moved closer to securing a Champions League return, with manager Carrick's tactical approach yielding results against a troubled Chelsea side. The victory demonstrates United's growing momentum in their pursuit of European qualification.
content: Carrick seems to have the blueprint to get Man United back to Europe's top table after beating Chelsea.

zh.title: 曼联击败日益陷入困境的切尔西，逼近欧冠回归
zh.summary: 曼联击败切尔西，离重返欧冠更进一步，卡里克的战术方案在对阵困境中的切尔西时见效。这场胜利展现了曼联在争取欧洲资格赛中的强劲势头。
